message:
Refine bd-36he UI fix beads based on code review

Key changes based on actual NTM codebase analysis:

## Beads Updated with Accurate Information
- bd-1xoe: Changed from "view caching" to "content height management"
  - View() already uses fresh strings.Builder correctly
  - Real issue: content exceeds terminal height causing scroll artifacts

- bd-2usu: Enhanced with specific code locations and fix patterns
  - Status bar in scrollable area instead of fixed footer

- bd-1ay2: Added file-specific audit (table.go, layout.go)
  - help.go already uses lipgloss.Width() correctly

- bd-3v69: Added panel size propagation requirements
  - WindowSizeMsg handler exists but doesn't resize all panels

- bd-3b3f: Comprehensive unit test specifications
  - Golden file tests, height management tests, deduplication tests

- bd-1323: Complete VHS tape specifications for E2E visual testing
  - Resize tests, navigation tests, refresh accumulation tests

- bd-3822: Full debug mode specification
  - State inspector, render timing, overflow detection

## Beads Closed (Merged as Duplicates)
- bd-2hg1: Merged into bd-1xoe (same root cause)
- bd-108u: Merged into bd-144k (same root cause)

## No Dependency Cycles Found
Verified with bv --robot-suggest --suggest-type cycle

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
